name: Windows utilities · Info+ GUI companion (multi_scripts_lib/work)
description: GUI companion utilities adjacent to Info+_CLI within multi_scripts_lib/work/info+_GUI for Windows desktop workflows.
longDescription: Graphical companion to the Info+ CLI in the same `multi_scripts_lib` monorepo (`work/info+_GUI`), aimed at Windows desktop workflows. Scope is intentionally narrow and paired with the CLI entry.
features: Co-located with Info+ CLI under multi_scripts_lib/work
highlights: Shows paired CLI/GUI packaging patterns inside one workspace
challenges: Limited public documentation for this slice of the monorepo.
solutions: Keep the summary concise; the source link shows the full implementation context.
security: Review GUI dependencies for supply-chain risk before distribution
